title: 名探偵シャノワールと消えた黄金の魚
synopsis: 夜の街を舞台に、クールな猫の探偵「シャノワール」が、お嬢様猫から盗まれた「黄金の魚」の捜索依頼を受ける。わずかな手がかりを頼りに犯人を追い詰めるが、その先には意外な真実が待っていた。ミステリーと可愛らしさが融合した、ハートフルなショートアニメーション。

characters.name: シャノワール
characters.personality: 腕利きの名探偵。クールでダンディを気取っているが、美味しい魚と可愛いものには弱い。鋭い観察眼で事件を解決に導く。
characters.appearance_prompt: A cool and stylish anthropomorphic black cat detective, named Chanoir. He has sleek black fur, piercing green eyes, and consistently wears a miniature brown tweed detective coat and a matching deerstalker hat. He is often seen holding a small magnifying glass. The style is a charming 2D animation with a storybook feel, reminiscent of classic European cartoons. Consistent character design throughout all scenes.
characters.voice_style: 低く、落ち着いたダンディなトーン。少し気取った話し方。

characters.name: マリー
characters.personality: 裕福な家で飼われているお嬢様猫。少し泣き虫だが、心優しく、困っているものを見過ごせない。
characters.appearance_prompt: A fluffy and elegant anthropomorphic white Persian cat, named Marie. She has big, teary blue eyes, and wears a sparkling pink collar with a small golden bell. Her fur is always perfectly groomed. The style is a charming 2D animation with a storybook feel, consistent with Chanoir's design. Consistent character design throughout all scenes.
characters.voice_style: 高く、可憐な声。少し泣きそうな、お嬢様風の話し方。

characters.name: ナレーター
characters.personality: 物語の進行を補足する語り手。
characters.voice_style: 落ち着いていて、少しミステリアスな雰囲気の語り口。

music.bgm_prompt: A cool, mysterious, and slightly playful jazz track for a detective story. A walking bassline on an upright bass, smooth saxophone melody, light brush strokes on the drums, and sparse piano chords. The tempo is medium-slow (around 90 BPM), perfect for a late-night city stroll. Film noir atmosphere, instrumental.
music.mood: 夜の街を舞台にした探偵物語にぴったりの、クールでミステリアスなジャズ。

scenes.title: 涙の依頼人
scenes.description: 夜の路地裏。探偵事務所の前で、お嬢様猫マリーが泣きながら事件を説明している。
scenes.veo_prompt: A charming 2D animation scene in a dimly lit, cobblestone alley at night. A fluffy white Persian cat named Marie, with big teary blue eyes, is pleading with a black cat detective, Chanoir. Chanoir, wearing a detective coat and hat, stands in the doorway of his office, listening intently. The scene has a film noir feel with long shadows cast by a single streetlamp. Low-angle shot.

dialogue.text: 私の…私の大切な黄金の魚が盗まれたんです！

scenes.title: 小さな手がかり
scenes.description: 犯行現場で、シャノワールが虫眼鏡を使って床を調べている。彼はキラリと光る赤いウロコを見つける。
scenes.veo_prompt: A charming 2D animation. Inside a luxurious room, the black cat detective Chanoir, in his coat and hat, is examining the floor with a magnifying glass next to an empty, fancy fish bowl. A beam of light from the magnifying glass highlights a tiny, shimmering red scale on the plush carpet. The camera zooms in slowly on the red scale. Soft, focused lighting.

dialogue.text: 現場に残された、小さな赤いウロコ。これが唯一の手がかりだった。

scenes.title: 夜の追跡
scenes.description: シャノワールが夜の街の屋根を身軽に駆け抜ける。赤いウロコが点々と落ちているのを追っていく。
scenes.veo_prompt: A dynamic 2D animation tracking shot. The black cat detective Chanoir, a sleek silhouette in his detective coat and hat, gracefully leaps across rooftops against a backdrop of a sprawling city at night with glowing windows. The camera follows him from the side as he follows a faint trail of shimmering red scales on the roof tiles. Fast-paced, fluid animation.

scenes.title: 意外な犯人
scenes.description: 路地裏の行き止まり。一匹の小さな子猫が、盗まれた「黄金の魚」（実は金魚のおもちゃ）を抱きしめて遊んでいる。
scenes.veo_prompt: A charming 2D animation. In a dead-end alley, a small, scruffy ginger kitten is happily playing with a shiny, golden-colored toy fish. From the shadows, the black cat detective Chanoir peeks out from behind a trash can, his expression changing from determined to surprised and gentle. The scene is lit by a soft moonlight.

scenes.title: 優しい解決
scenes.description: マリーが子猫に新しいおもちゃをプレゼントしている。シャノワールは壁に寄りかかり、満足げに微笑む。
scenes.veo_prompt: A heartwarming 2D animation scene. The fluffy white cat Marie gently offers a new, colorful ball of yarn to the small ginger kitten. The kitten drops the toy fish and happily accepts it. In the background, Chanoir the detective leans against a brick wall with his arms crossed, a small, satisfied smile on his face. Warm, gentle lighting.

dialogue.text: 黄金の魚は、ただのおもちゃ。マリーの優しさが、事件を解決に導いた。

scenes.title: 探偵の報酬
scenes.description: 探偵事務所に戻ったシャノワール。報酬として貰った本物の高級な魚の缶詰を前に、うっとりしている。
scenes.veo_prompt: A close-up 2D animation shot. Back in his office, Chanoir the black cat detective is sitting at his desk. He has taken off his hat. In front of him is an open can of premium fish. He licks his lips with a look of pure bliss, his green eyes sparkling. The scene is warm and cozy, lit by a desk lamp.
